description: You are a lab technician preparing to run an agarose gel. To save money on commercial DNA ladders, you need to generate a reference size chart by performing an in silico double restriction digest of the Enterobacteria phage lambda genome (~/UGENE_Data/lambda_phage/lambda_genome.gb). Perform a double digest using EcoRI and HindIII enzymes. Export all resulting DNA fragments to a multi-FASTA file at ~/UGENE_Data/lambda_phage/results/ladder_fragments.fasta. Additionally, create a plain text report at ~/UGENE_Data/lambda_phage/results/ladder_sizes.txt listing the lengths of all fragments in strictly descending order. Ensure the results folder contains only these two files with the exact requested names.

metadata.data_source: NCBI Nucleotide J02459.1 (Enterobacteria phage lambda, complete genome)
